author: poet/tree
title: Hmmmm, not working?
content: Tried everything I could think of but still could not find a way to access the music in my Apple Music library ( on my iphone) whose metadata I wanted to correct. The help files told me nothing more and suggest that this app now only works with online (Dropbox etc folders) but that’s of no interest to me. Would be very happy to pay for an app can do what I thought this could. So it goes.

author: qjjwnwjejne e
content: It worked perfectly fine for a while but now if I put tags on a file the file no longer works
